channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: England manager Tuchel defends semi-final tactics amid criticism
item.description: England's manager Thomas Tuchel addressed media queries about his tactical choices during the World Cup semi-final against Argentina, where England took a 1-0 lead but lost 2-1. Despite backlash over ...

item.title: Ukrainian drones strike Russian energy and logistics targets, causing casualties
item.description: Russian officials confirmed eight deaths and over 60 injuries from overnight Ukrainian drone attacks targeting warehouses, oil depots, and infrastructure in Russia. The strikes hit two Wildberries war...

item.title: Tony Elumelu says preparation and luck both played key roles in his business success
item.description: Billionaire businessman and Chairman of United Bank for Africa (UBA), Tony Elumelu, has shared that hard work, intelligence and determination alone do not always guarantee success. Speaking during an ...

item.title: The Sydney Morning Herald's Mini Crossword Puzzle for Subscribers
item.description: The article promotes the Mini Crossword puzzle featured in The Sydney Morning Herald, offering subscribers a chance to engage with a challenging word puzzle. It highlights the puzzle's structure, with...

item.title: Wallabies dominate Italy in decisive victory
item.description: The Wallabies delivered a commanding 57-10 victory over Italy, showcasing their renewed strength after a challenging period. The win, which saw nine tries scored, highlighted the team's exceptional fo...

item.title: Hospital worker accused of accepting bribe at Salem government hospital
item.description: A video showing a hospital worker at Salem Government Mohan Kumaramangalam Medical College Hospital (GMKMCH) accepting a bribe from a patient's relative has gone viral on social media. The footage cap...

item.title: NLP Acknowledges Fourth-Place Finish in Ol Kalou By-Election with 103 Votes
item.description: The National Liberal Party (NLP) has acknowledged its candidate's fourth-place finish in the Ol Kalou parliamentary by-election, securing 103 votes. Party leader Dr. Augustus Kyalo Muli described the ...

item.title: Edo Police Rescue Abducted Cattle Dealer
item.description: Operatives from the Edo State Police Command successfully rescued Mr. Peter Balogun, a cattle dealer kidnapped by bandits, after a coordinated operation involving the Anti-Kidnapping Unit, Violent Cri...

item.title: Anxiety Over Viral Fitness Moments
item.description: Gabrielle Drolet's column discusses the anxiety of being a fitness influencer's background in viral workout videos. The author reflects on societal pressures, social media's role in amplifying persona...

item.title: Lobbying and Political Influence in South Africa: Calls for Greater Transparency and Regulation
item.description: The article discusses the controversy surrounding Tony Leon, Resolve Communications, and allegations of lobbying on behalf of clients like Starlink, sparking a broader debate on political influence, t...

item.title: Binibining Pilipinas 2026 Final Competition and Coronation Night Updates
item.description: The article provides live updates on the Binibining Pilipinas 2026 final competition and coronation night, which took place on July 18, 2026. The event, organized by ABS-CBN, featured the culmination ...

item.title: Scooby-Doo Puzzle Book Review: Engaging Activities for Fans
item.description: This article reviews the book 'Scooby-Doo! Solve the Puzzles,' a colorful activity book designed for fans of the classic cartoon series. The book offers a variety of puzzles and challenges that engage...

item.title: Egyptian President El Sisi meets Tanzanian officials to discuss anti-human trafficking strategies
item.description: Egyptian President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi received a warm welcome in Tanzania as he arrived for high-level talks with local leaders. The visit focuses on strengthening bilateral cooperation to combat hu...

item.title: escalation of conflict: iran and us target each other's infrastructure
item.description: iran launched coordinated attacks on gulf states and jordan following a seventh consecutive night of us strikes on iranian military targets, escalating regional tensions. kuwait faced sustained missil...

item.title: Andy Burnham outlines new North Sea oil and gas drilling plans amid political debate
item.description: Andy Burnham, the newly elected Labour leader, is set to announce his policy agenda on Monday, including continuation of existing North Sea oil and gas licenses despite legal challenges. The decision ...

item.title: Trump's Speech Highlights Election Integrity Concerns and Accusations Against China
item.description: The article critiques President Donald Trump's recent speech, emphasizing the significant omissions that underscore his focus on personal grievances rather than national issues. Trump accused China of...

item.title: Tanzania's Progress in SDGs and Regional Diplomacy Highlighted
item.description: The article discusses Tanzania's recent achievements in sustainable development goals (SDGs) as recognized at a United Nations forum. It also covers the G7 Foreign Ministers' collaborative efforts to ...

item.title: Lawyers Action Committee Condemns JCP Judge Appointment Process as 'Horse Trading'
item.description: The Lawyers Action Committee (LAC) has strongly criticized the Judicial Commission of Pakistan's (JCP) process for appointing judges to high courts, calling it 'horse trading' and a 'horrific' system....

item.title: Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka Endorses Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna for Presidency
item.description: Kisii Senator Richard Onyonka has shifted his political support from former Interior Cabinet Secretary Fred Matiang'i to Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna for the 2027 presidential race. This move marks a ...

item.title: Bwala Outlines Tinubu’s Multi-Pronged Strategy to Combat Insecurity
item.description: Daniel Bwala, President Tinubu’s media adviser, outlined a comprehensive strategy to tackle insurgency, banditry, and kidnapping in Nigeria. The plan includes expanding security personnel, deploying t...
